{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032300485245D4415CDA0DE3246574\"}"},"total":49},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601967091344950078","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"部分段落前后矛盾，情节张驰有度，但略显拖沓；部分角色背景有待考查，合理性可酌情增加，因世界观过多，背景过杂，所以可以理解；悬疑可以留，坑不能挖太多；最后希望你写的可以越来越好。\nps:动感超人是小新最喜欢的东西之一，不错,但你给那些读者看到前期太过多的动感超人出现,看不到你后面用心的点的话,会适得其反，也许单元回是你可以考虑的方向。","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":97,"text":"小新","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E6%96%B0\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774198132E3246574%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601967091344950078%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227597819297213205566%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E6%96%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769975112,"group_id":"7597819297213205566","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8gcwvLQdtRo59YQ86l2jYs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9be466812dde4ca88986f7a24eb29441~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776790940\u0026x-signature=9Jl9tyj1oTHIj1mnMRqqgryVqZo%3D","user_id":"782493108413965","user_name":"路过的旅拓者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"782493108413965","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597819297213205566","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一个综漫的世界，17岁的新之助，会和大家所熟知的很多角色进行互动，他开朗的性格会渐渐救赎那些有遗憾的人。（里面涉及春物，三年E班，实教，柯南，齐木楠雄的灾难，鬼灭之刃等，可以放心食用，角色会尽量贴合原著）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/da956b15a253e6896bdbf97ab82b415b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"道池","author_id":"","book_id":"7597819297213205566","book_name":"综漫：我，野原新之助17岁了哦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d0d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4934人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":858,\"name\":\"轻小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858\u0026name=轻小说\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":465,\"name\":\"综漫\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465\u0026name=综漫\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":841,\"name\":\"群像\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841\u0026name=群像\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597819685979046462","read_count":"4934","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"232238"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"45","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,二次元,综漫,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da956b15a253e6896bdbf97ab82b415b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x
